events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need produce JSON answer. Need assess scenario. Let's parse. Scenario: Photos of duct installation show several completed pieces, but area count and remaining scope not listed. Submitted package does not include quantity takeoff needed to score checkpoint. Reference material: IMC 603, SMACNA, Manual D. Stage rough-complete. Need decision pass/fail/needs_more_info. Since missing quantity takeoff needed to score checkpoint, cannot verify completeness. No defects described. So decision likely needs_more_info. Risk low? Maybe medium due to inability to verify scope/completeness. Work stage rough-complete. Component conditions none. Percent complete unknown maybe 0? But we can estimate not determinable. Value 0. Sound etc default. Findings: quantity takeoff missing; cannot assess remaining scope. Actions: submit quantity takeoff and area count. Rationale. References IMC 603, SMACNA, Manual D. Need ensure JSON valid. No prose outside.
